untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit implied volatility (IV) and realized volatility comparison with dynamic threshold multiplier [THRESHOLD_NEEDED]. The allowed indicators hvol_20 (historical volatility) and india_vix (volatility index proxy) are approximations, but the core logic requires: (1) precise IV from option pricing models not available in standard OHLCV indicator set, (2) parameterized threshold multiplier [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] that was not specified, (3) position-sizing constraint relative to account equity that requires portfolio-level context beyond bar-level indicators, (4) rebalancing P&L tracking across multiple hedge legs. This is a sophisticated volatility arbitrage signal requiring options analytics beyond backtest engine scope.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses hvol_20 as proxy for realized volatility and india_vix as proxy for implied volatility, but this is fundamentally incomplete. The signal's core value requires parameterization of volatility_threshold_multiplier, lookback_period_days, and position_size_pct_of_account—none of which were provided. Exit condition on cumulative rebalancing P&L cannot be expressed in bar-level indicators. Recommend: (1) specify threshold multiplier value, (2) provide IV data source (option prices or volatility surface), (3) implement in options-aware backtester.
